title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Moral Virtue
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Moral Virtue.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Moral Virtue.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Moral Virtue': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
